{"credits": [{"type": "reporter", "user": {"avatar_url": "https://avatars.githubusercontent.com/u/37150973?v=4", "events_url": "https://api.github.com/users/ori-ron/events{/privacy}", "followers_url": "https://api.github.com/users/ori-ron/followers", "following_url": "https://api.github.com/users/ori-ron/following{/other_user}", "gists_url": "https://api.github.com/users/ori-ron/gists{/gist_id}", "gravatar_id": "", "html_url": "https://github.com/ori-ron", "id": 37150973, "login": "ori-ron", "node_id": "MDQ6VXNlcjM3MTUwOTcz", "organizations_url": "https://api.github.com/users/ori-ron/orgs", "received_events_url": "https://api.github.com/users/ori-ron/received_events", "repos_url": "https://api.github.com/users/ori-ron/repos", "site_admin": false, "starred_url": "https://api.github.com/users/ori-ron/starred{/owner}{/repo}", "subscriptions_url": "https://api.github.com/users/ori-ron/subscriptions", "type": "User", "url": "https://api.github.com/users/ori-ron", "user_view_type": "public"}}], "cve_id": "CVE-2026-42230", "cvss": {"score": 4.7, "vector_string": "CVSS:3.1/AV:N/AC:L/PR:N/UI:R/S:C/C:L/I:N/A:N"}, "cvss_severities": {"cvss_v3": {"score": 4.7, "vector_string": "CVSS:3.1/AV:N/AC:L/PR:N/UI:R/S:C/C:L/I:N/A:N"}, "cvss_v4": {"score": 5.1, "vector_string": "CVSS:4.0/AV:N/AC:L/AT:N/PR:N/UI:A/VC:L/VI:N/VA:N/SC:L/SI:N/SA:N"}}, "cwes": [{"cwe_id": "CWE-601", "name": "URL Redirection to Untrusted Site ('Open Redirect')"}], "description": "## Impact
The `/mcp-oauth/register` endpoint accepted OAuth client registrations without authentication, allowing arbitrary `redirect_uri` values to be registered. When a user denies the MCP OAuth consent dialog, the `handleDeny` handler redirects the user to the registered `redirect_uri` without validation, enabling an open redirect to an attacker-controlled URL. An attacker can craft a phishing link and send it to a victim; if the victim clicks "Deny" on the consent page, they are silently redirected to an external site.

## Patches
The issue has been fixed in n8n versions 1.123.32, 2.17.4, and 2.18.1. Users should upgrade to one of these versions or later to remediate the vulnerability.

## Workarounds
If upgrading is not immediately possible, administrators should consider the following temporary mitigations:
- Restrict network access to the n8n instance to prevent untrusted users from reaching the MCP OAuth endpoints.
- Limit access to the n8n instance to fully trusted users only.

These workarounds do not fully remediate the risk and should only be used as short-term mitigation measures.", "epss": {"percentage": 0.00181, "percentile": 0.07818}, "ghsa_id": "GHSA-f6x8-65q6-j9m9", "github_reviewed_at": "2026-04-29T21:10:17Z", "html_url": "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-f6x8-65q6-j9m9", "identifiers": [{"type": "GHSA", "value": "GHSA-f6x8-65q6-j9m9"}, {"type": "CVE", "value": "CVE-2026-42230"}], "nvd_published_at": "2026-05-04T19:16:05Z", "published_at": "2026-04-29T21:10:17Z", "references": ["https://github.com/n8n-io/n8n/security/advisories/GHSA-f6x8-65q6-j9m9", "https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-42230", "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-f6x8-65q6-j9m9"], "repository_advisory_url": "https://api.github.com/repos/n8n-io/n8n/security-advisories/GHSA-f6x8-65q6-j9m9", "severity": "medium", "source_code_location": "https://github.com/n8n-io/n8n", "summary": "n8n has Open Redirect in MCP OAuth Consent Flow", "type": "reviewed", "updated_at": "2026-05-08T01:30:47Z", "url": "https://api.github.com/advisories/GHSA-f6x8-65q6-j9m9", "vulnerabilities": [{"first_patched_version": "1.123.32", "package": {"ecosystem": "npm", "name": "n8n"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": "< 1.123.32"}, {"first_patched_version": "2.18.1", "package": {"ecosystem": "npm", "name": "n8n"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": ">= 2.18.0, < 2.18.1"}, {"first_patched_version": "2.17.4", "package": {"ecosystem": "npm", "name": "n8n"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": ">= 2.0.0, < 2.17.4"}], "withdrawn_at": null}

title: n8n has Open Redirect in MCP OAuth Consent Flow
